title: struct names should follow a naming convention
description: "struct" names should comply with a naming conventionAnalyze your codeconsistency-identifiablemaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?Sharing some naming conventions enables teams to collaborate more efficiently. This rule checks that allstructnames match a provided regular expression.Noncompliant code exampleUsing the default regular expression^[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$:struct myStruct { int one; int two; };Compliant solutionstruct MyStruct { int one; int two; };Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Struct names should follow a naming convention (PascalCase, no underscores)
